compressed_prompt:
Write a plot for a story about two people who swap fingerprints. Include a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>. In your response please avoid using commas.

<<fingerprint swap thriller>> plot with no commas
response:
<<Fingerprint Swap Thriller>>

Two strangers meet by chance at a high-tech biotech conference. Daniel is a disgraced forensic analyst haunted by a cold case he can’t solve. Elena is a brilliant but reckless geneticist testing an experimental fingerprint-altering serum. After a heated argument about ethics they drunkenly dare each other to try the procedure. In a moment of impulsive defiance they inject the serum and wake up the next morning with swapped fingerprints.

At first it’s a bizarre joke—Daniel laughs as his phone unlocks with Elena’s prints. But when Daniel’s old case files suddenly implicate Elena in a murder she didn’t commit the stakes turn deadly. The serum’s effects are temporary and fading fast. As their prints begin reverting they realize someone framed Elena using Daniel’s original prints. Now they’re both wanted—Daniel for a crime he didn’t commit and Elena for one she couldn’t have.

Hunted by corrupt cops and a shadowy biotech syndicate they must race against time to reverse the swap before their prints fully revert. Along the way they uncover a conspiracy involving stolen identities and a black-market fingerprint database. The serum’s creator holds the antidote but demands a dangerous favor in return. With no allies and no proof of their innocence they must trust each other completely—even as their own bodies betray them.

In a final showdown they confront the mastermind behind the frame-up only to discover the serum was never meant to work. The real experiment was testing how far two strangers would go to protect each other. As their prints snap back to normal they erase the evidence of the swap but the bond they forged remains. The case is closed but their lives are forever changed.
